$description: Yogibo 제품별 이미지 인덱스. curated_hero는 unloaded studio shot 우선 추천. products_folder는 추가 후보들의 위치.

names.jp: ヨギボー マックス

max.shape_summary: Long pill/cylinder with rounded ends, single seam, no handle, no character. Like a giant body pillow.

mini.shape_summary: Short pill — same silhouette as Max but ~half length. Nearly cubic when stood up.
mini.curated_hero_quality: POOR — child sitting on it deforms shape; replace recommended
mini.notes: Most marketing photos show people sitting; finding clean unloaded shot is hard

midi.shape_summary: Pill between Mini and Max length. Visually nearly identical to Lite — disambiguate by SKU.
midi.notes: JP currently clearance. No US equivalent. Lite/Midi visually indistinguishable.

lite.shape_summary: Slim mid-length pill. Same construction as Max but slimmer cross-section.

names.jp: ヨギボー ドロップ

drop.shape_summary: Vertical teardrop/onion shape with prominent fabric carrying handle on top, vertical pumpkin-segment seams.
drop.best_camera_angle: 3/4 slightly above eye level (handle + base curve in same frame)
drop.notes: ⚠️ US sells this as 'Pod X' — yogibo.com has no 'Drop'. Don't confuse with Pod (different product).

pod.shape_summary: Squat sphere/squashed-ball with small drawstring loop on top. Rounder/squatter than Drop.
pod.notes: ⚠️ NO US equivalent. US 'Pod X' is the Drop, not this.

names.jp: ヨギボー ピラミッド

pyramid.shape_summary: Three-sided rounded pyramid (rounded tetrahedron). Three triangular fabric panels meeting at soft point.
pyramid.best_camera_angle: High 3/4 from above (all three faces visible)

names.jp: ヨギボー ラウンジャー

lounger.shape_summary: Organic shark-fin/comma shape with sewn piped rim that maintains the curve even unloaded.
lounger.notes: Easiest Yogibo to reconstruct from a single photo (firm piping holds shape).

names.jp: ヨギボー ギガ マックス

doublemax.shape_summary: Wide pill, twice as wide as Max. Two Max inners joined laterally inside one cover.
doublemax.best_camera_angle: Lying-flat top-down or 3/4 to compare width
doublemax.notes: Naming pitfall: US 'Double Max' = JP 'Giga Max' = KR '더블 맥스'. Different from JP 'Mega Max' (which is wide-Lite, not wide-Max).

names.jp: ラックス オットマン

ottoman.shape_summary: Soft cube/short-cylinder footstool. Flat top and bottom, low drum side panel.
ottoman.best_camera_angle: 3/4 from slightly above (top, side, base edges visible)
ottoman.notes: Standard Ottoman exists in JP only ('omn'); KR has Luxe variant only.

prime.shape_summary: Extra-long horizontal log/bolster. Low and very long, no handle, no segmentation.
prime.notes: ⚠️ KR-EXCLUSIVE. SKU FUBST102. No JP or US equivalent.

hugibo.shape_summary: Humanoid bowling-pin body with smaller round head, two short side arms, printed face (eyes + smiling mouth) on front panel.
hugibo.best_camera_angle: Front view, full body, arms visible (face square to camera)
hugibo.notes: Only Yogibo with defined character silhouette. No US.

bubble.shape_summary: Two-tone short cylinder/drum (NOT spherical despite name). Top half + bottom half different colors.
bubble.best_camera_angle: Side-on at eye level (both color zones visible)

names.jp: ヨギボー サポート

support.shape_summary: U-shape/horseshoe backrest. Top-down view: thick letter U with two side wings.

names.jp: ヨギボー ロール マックス

rollmax.shape_summary: Long uniform-diameter cylinder/tube. Smooth, flat circular end caps. Like a giant rolling pin.
rollmax.best_camera_angle: Lying on floor 3/4, one end facing camera

rollmidi.shape_summary: Medium cylinder, same proportions as Roll Max but shorter (~120cm).

rollmini.shape_summary: Short stubby cylinder. Almost a thick disc.

names.jp: ヨギボー キャタピラー ロール

caterpillar.shape_summary: Extra-long thin cylinder with visible alternating-color ring panels along its length. Often draped in S-curve.
caterpillar.best_camera_angle: Laid out straight, full length visible
caterpillar.notes: Hard to find straight-laid photos; most show curved-over-sofa configuration

rollmate_dog.shape_summary: Roll Mini-style cylinder body with small dog plush head (floppy ears, brown-and-cream).
rollmate_dog.best_camera_angle: Side view, head facing camera-left or right

rollmate_fox.shape_summary: Cylinder body with pointed fox ears and bushy tail. Orange/white.

rollmate_unicorn.shape_summary: Cylinder body with horn on head, mane, tail. Pastel pink/purple.

rollmate_panda.shape_summary: Black-and-white cylinder body with round panda ears. No tail.

rollmate_alligator.shape_summary: Green cylinder body with long crocodile snout (segmented teeth print), back ridges, tail.

rollmate_axolotl.shape_summary: Pale lavender cylinder body with frilly external gills on sides of head, small leg fins.
rollmate_axolotl.notes: ⚠️ KR-EXCLUSIVE. Frilly gills are the most distinctive feature among Roll Mates.

names.jp: ヨギボー ゴースト

ghost.shape_summary: Tall flat-faced backrest with rounded top edge. NOT ghost-shaped — looks like a soft tombstone.
ghost.notes: JP-only. Customers may expect cute ghost figure based on name; actual product is back-support furniture.

variant_lines.$description: Cover/material variants — do NOT change the inflatable inner shape

premium.description: Higher inner-bead density, same outer shape

premium_plus.jp_text: プレミアム プラス
